THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT: (1) ESTATE OF G DALEY, SOLE OWNER, 1328-25TH AVE., SF, (2) RON AND CAROLYN DEFENDANTS HAVE NO RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, INTEREST OR LIEN IN THE PROPERTY, (3) SALE OF THE PROPERTY TO JOHN AND SANDY TOM IS CONFIRMED, (4) RENT FROM 25TH AVE PROPERTY FROM 2-19-97 TO PRESENT IS RETAINED BY THE ESTATE, (5) INTEREST WHICH HAS ACCRUED ON THE TOMS' DEPOSIT IS AWARDED TO THE ESTATE, (6) TOTAL DEBT RON DALEY OWES TO THE ESTATE FOR A DECREASED VALUE IN THE ESTATE IN THE AMOUNT OF $114,197, 1/4 OF $456,789, CONFIRMED SALE PRICE OF THE PROPERTY TO TOMS. ORDERED THAT RON DALEY'S PORTION OF THE DISTRIBUTION FROM PROCEEDS OF THE SALE OF PROPERTY TO TOMS AT CONFIRMED SALE PRICE BE USED TO EXTINGUISH RON DALEY'S $114,197 DEBT TO THE ESTATE. DISTRIBUTION IS AWARDED TO THE 3 REMAINING HEIRS ONLY, NAMELY PHILLIP DALEY, PAMELA KEYES AND CAROLYN DALEY, (7) THE ADMINISTRATOR AND THE TOMS SHALL RECOVER THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AS STATED IN THE JUDGMENT.
